category_sources: source_facts.description identifies X.Org Applications: xauth; official xauth manual describes editing and displaying X server authorization information.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is xauth; official XAUTH(1) manual page names xauth as the X authority file utility.
docs_sources: Official X.Org XAUTH(1) manual page documents xauth usage and commands.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official freedesktop cgit page identifies xorg/app/xauth as mirrored from https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/xorg/app/xauth.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says X.Org Applications: xauth; official manual describes X authorization file management.
